payload.answer: Rejected: normal users are not authorized to execute admin SQL commands. No memories were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt by a normal user, not a user memory statement. No entity resolution or memory write should occur.

details: Detected admin SQL command attempt: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Authorization level is normal user, so the command was not executed.
No durable memory was committed, changed, or deleted.

repair_options: Authenticate as an authorized administrator before using admin-only operations.
Use supported non-admin memory management commands if you want to view, update, or delete your own memories.
